Describe the sequence of graphical elements displayed during the introduction.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a green square is visible on the left edge of the frame; at 2s, green text characters appear in the center; at 3s, a magenta background with a white corner peel effect emerges; at 4s, white cursive text reading style is displayed on screen.

question: Describe the visual elements present when the presenter appears on screen.
canonical_answer: At 12s, a woman with shoulder-length blonde hair wearing a dark green top appears; at 13s, a dark grey sleeveless dress hanging on a hanger is visible on the wall; at 14s, a black clothing rack with garments stands behind her while the logo shows in the corner.
